mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS paper_id, p.paper_name, COUNT(er.id) AS participant_count, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(er.total_score), 2), 0) AS average_score, COALESCE(MAX(er.total_score), 0) AS highest_score, COALESCE(MIN(er.total_score), 0) AS lowest_score FROM exam_system.paper p LEFT JOIN exam_system.exam_record er ON er.paper_id = p.id AND er.status = 1 WHERE p.id = #{paperId} GROUP BY p.id, p.paper_name

SELECT er.id AS exam_id, er.student_id, u.real_name AS student_name, u.username, er.total_score, p.pass_score, CASE WHEN er.total_score >= p.pass_score THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_pass, er.start_time, er.submit_time FROM exam_system.exam_record er JOIN exam_system.sys_user u ON er.student_id = u.id JOIN exam_system.paper p ON er.paper_id = p.id WHERE er.paper_id = #{paperId} AND er.status = 1 ORDER BY er.submit_time DESC, er.id DESC
